{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Steel Swarm
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Swarm]] is a mid-level [[Advocate]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Swarm]] provided footage of the incident.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
